---
author-meta: stesiam
description-meta: "Μία ιστοσελίδα ενός φοιτητή Στατιστικής που θέλει να μοιραστεί το πάθος του για τον προγραμματισμό με την R, την ανάλυση και οπτικοποίηση δεδομένων."
pagetitle: "Αρχική"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    comments: false
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
            :root {
              --accent: #a855f7;
              --accent-light: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.12);
              --text-main: #222;
              --text-secondary: #555;
            }

            hr {
              margin: 3em 30% 0em;
              border: 2px solid white;
            }

            body {
              color: var(--text-main);
              margin: 0;
              display: flex;
              flex-direction: column;
              justify-content: center;
              align-items: center;
              background-image: linear-gradient( rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) ), url('assets/images/stes_background.webp');
              background-size: cover;
            }

            #quarto-document-content {
              margin: auto 0;
              text-align: center;
              padding: 2em 0.5em;
              background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.8);
              border-radius: 1em;
            }

            header {
              margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }

            h1 {
              font-size: 2.8rem;
              font-weight: 600;
              letter-spacing: -0.5px;
              color: #e1dede;
            }

            p.tagline {
              font-size: 1.15rem;
              margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
              color: #e1dede;
              font-style: italic;
            }

            /* Buttons */
            .btn-modern {
              border-radius: 40px;
              padding: 0.75rem 1.7rem;
              font-weight: 500;
              margin: 0.3rem;
              border: none;
              position: relative;
              transition: all 0.3s ease;
              background: var(--accent);
              color: #fff;
              box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.25);
              text-decoration: none;
            }

            .btn-modern:hover, .btn-modern:focus-visible {
              background: #9333ea;
              transform: translateY(-2px);
              box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.35);
              outline: none;
            }

            .btn-outline-modern {
              background: transparent;
              border: 2px solid var(--accent);
              color: var(--accent);
            }

            .btn-outline-modern:hover, .btn-outline-modern:focus-visible {
              background: var(--accent);
              color: #fff;
              transform: translateY(-2px);
              box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.25);
            }

            /* Socials */
            nav.socials {
              margin-top: 2rem;
              display: flex;
              flex-wrap: wrap;
              justify-content: center;
              gap: 1.2rem;
            }

            .social-card {
              display: flex;
              align-items: center;
              gap: 0.5rem;
              padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
              border-radius: 50px;
              background: var(--card-bg, #fff);
              border: 1px solid var(--card-border, #e4e6eb);
              color: var(--card-text, var(--text-main));
              font-weight: 500;
              text-decoration: none;
              transition: all 0.25s ease;
              box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
            }

            .social-card:hover, .social-card:focus-visible {
              background: var(--accent-light);
              color: var(--accent);
              border-color: var(--accent);
              transform: translateY(-2px);
              box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2);
              outline: none;
            }

            .social-card i {
              font-size: 1.25rem;
            }

            footer {
              width: 100%;
              font-size: 0.9rem;
              color: var(--text-secondary);
            }

            @media (max-width: 576px) {
              #quarto-content {
                margin: 2em 1em;
              }
              #quarto-document-content {
                padding: 2.5rem 1rem;
                margin: auto 0;
                text-align: center;
              }
              h1 { font-size: 2rem; }
              p.tagline { font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
              .btn-modern, .btn-outline-modern {
                display: block;
                width: 80%;
                margin: 0.5rem auto;
              }
              nav.socials { gap: 1rem; }
              .social-card {
                font-size: 0.95rem;
                padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem;
              }
            }

            /* Focus outline for accessibility */
            a:focus-visible, button:focus-visible {
              outline: 3px solid var(--accent);
              outline-offset: 2px;
            }

            /* Socials brand colors on hover */
            .social-card.github:hover,
            .social-card.github:focus-visible {
              background: #333;
              color: #fff;
              border-color: #333;
            }
            .social-card.linkedin:hover,
            .social-card.linkedin:focus-visible {
              background: #0077B5;
              color: #fff;
              border-color: #0077B5;
            }
            .social-card.mastodon:hover,
            .social-card.mastodon:focus-visible {
              background: #3088d4;
              color: #fff;
              border-color: #3088d4;
            }
            .social-card.bsky:hover,
            .social-card.bsky:focus-visible {
              background: #1eabfc;
              color: #fff;
              border-color: #1eabfc;
            }
            .social-card.youtube:hover,
            .social-card.youtube:focus-visible {
              background: #FF0000;
              color: #fff;
              border-color: #FF0000;
            }
          </style>
---



```{=html}

<div>
<h1>Γεια σου 👋, με λένε Στέλιο!</h1>
  <p class="tagline">Στατιστική • Rstats • Επιστήμη δεδομένων • Οπτικοποίηση δεδομένων</p>
</div>
  <div class="d-flex flex-md-row flex-column justify-content-center gap-2">
    <a href="https://stesiam.com/el/cv/" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded" aria-label="Διαβάστε το βιογραφικό μου"><i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> Το βιογραφικό μου</a>
    <a href="mailto:stesiam@proton.me" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded" aria-label="Πατήστε το κουμπί για να μου στείλετε μήνυμα στη διεύθυνση ηλεκτρονικού ταχυδρομείου μου"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Επικοινωνήστε μαζί μου</a>
  </div>
  
  <hr>

 <nav class="socials" aria-label="Σύνδεσμοι συνδέσμων των κοινωνικών μου δικτύων">
  <a href="https://github.com/stesiam" class="social-card github" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i> GitHub
  </a>
  <!--
  <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" class="social-card linkedin" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i> LinkedIn
  </a>
  -->
  <a href="https://fosstodon.org/@stesiam" class="social-card mastodon" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <i class="bi bi-mastodon" aria-hidden="true"></i> Mastodon
  </a>
  <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/stesiam.bsky.social" class="social-card bsky" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <i class="bi bi-bluesky" aria-hidden="true"></i> BlueSky
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@stesiam" class="social-card youtube" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <i class="bi bi-youtube" aria-hidden="true"></i> YouTube
  </a>
</nav>

```
